title: Add .github/FUNDING.yml (GitHub Sponsors button)
description: Add .github/FUNDING.yml so the Sponsor button appears on the public repo page. Requires a GitHub Sponsors profile to be set up first. One-liner: github: mandarnilange. Deferred until the repo is public and the Sponsors sign-up is complete.
acceptance_criteria: GitHub Sponsors profile is live at github.com/sponsors/mandarnilange
Sponsor button visible on the public repo page
